subcodes.first_line: The Herald calleth out at all times: "O ye servants of the Most Merciful! Hasten with your hearts toward the Beloved." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ینادی المناد فی کل الاحیان یا عباد الرحمن ان اسرعوا بالقلوب الی شطر المحبوب
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @suffering and imprisonment, @presence of; reunion with God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @justice and wrath of God, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
